481тЖТ# тФАтФАтФА SERIAL MONITORING THREAD тФАтФАтФА
482тЖТdef serial_monitor_task():
483тЖТ    serial_port = "/dev/cu.usbmodem5C361404121"
484тЖТ    while True:
485тЖТ        try:
486тЖТ            import serial
487тЖТ            with serial.Serial(serial_port, 115200, timeout=1) as ser:
488тЖТ                print(f"Serial: Connected to {serial_port}", flush=True)
489тЖТ                while True:
490тЖТ                    try:
491тЖТ                        line = ser.readline().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore').strip()
492тЖТ                        if not line:
493тЖТ                            continue
494тЖТ                        if line.startswith("USB_DATA:"):
495тЖТ                            payload_str = line[9:]
496тЖТ                            data = json.loads(payload_str)
497тЖТ                            db = database.SessionLocal()
498тЖТ                            try:
499тЖТ                                m = db.query(models.Machine).filter(models.Machine.id == data['node_id']).first()
500тЖТ                                if m and m.preferred_source != "WIFI":
501тЖТ                                    m.current_total_meters = data['meters']
502тЖТ                                    m.shift_meters = data['shift_meters']
503тЖТ                                    m.current_baud = data['baud']
504тЖТ                                    m.current_protocol = data['protocol']
505тЖТ                                    m.last_seen = datetime.utcnow()
506тЖТ                                    m.connection_source = "USB"
507тЖТ                                    m.esp_free_ram = data['free_ram']
508тЖТ                                    m.esp_total_ram = data['total_ram']
509тЖТ                                    m.esp_free_rom = data['free_rom']
510тЖТ                                    m.esp_total_rom = data['total_rom']
511тЖТ                                    m.esp_cpu_freq = data['cpu_freq']
512тЖТ                                    m.esp_wifi_ssid = data['wifi_ssid']
513тЖТ                                    m.esp_wifi_rssi = data['wifi_rssi']
514тЖТ                                    db.commit()
515тЖТ                            finally:
516тЖТ                                db.close()
517тЖТ                    except Exception as e:
518тЖТ                        print(f"Serial Loop Error: {e}")
519тЖТ                        break
520тЖТ        except Exception:
521тЖТ            time.sleep(2)
522тЖТ
523тЖТ@app.on_event("startup")
524тЖТasync def start_serial_monitor():
525тЖТ    thread = threading.Thread(target=serial_monitor_task, daemon=True)
526тЖТ    thread.start()

529тЖТ@app.websocket("/ws/machines")
530тЖТasync def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket):
531тЖТ    await websocket.accept()
532тЖТ    active_connections.append(websocket)
533тЖТ    try:
534тЖТ        while True:
535тЖТ            db = database.SessionLocal()
536тЖТ            try:
537тЖТ                machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
538тЖТ                data = []
539тЖТ                for m in machines:
540тЖТ                    remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
541тЖТ                    now = datetime.utcnow()
542тЖТ                    is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
543тЖТ                    if not is_esp_online:
544тЖТ                        status = "OFFLINE"
545тЖТ                    elif m.current_baud == 0:
546тЖТ                        status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
547тЖТ                    elif remaining <= 0:
548тЖТ                        status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
549тЖТ                    else:
550тЖТ                        status = "RUNNING"
551тЖТ                    data.append({
552тЖТ                        "id": m.id, "status": status,
553тЖТ                        "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2),
554тЖТ                        "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
555тЖТ                        "remaining": round(remaining, 2),
556тЖТ                        "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
557тЖТ                        "connection_source": m.connection_source,
558тЖТ                        "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
559тЖТ                        "sys_info": {
560тЖТ                            "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
561тЖТ                            "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
562тЖТ                            "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
563тЖТ                            "wifi": {"ssid": m.esp_wifi_ssid, "rssi": m.esp_wifi_rssi}
564тЖТ                        }
565тЖТ                    })
566тЖТ                await websocket.send_text(json.dumps(data))
567тЖТ            finally:
568тЖТ                db.close()
569тЖТ            await asyncio.sleep(2)
570тЖТ    except WebSocketDisconnect:
571тЖТ        pass
572тЖТ    except Exception as e:
573тЖТ        print(f"WS Error: {e}")
574тЖТ    finally:
575тЖТ        if websocket in active_connections:
576тЖТ            active_connections.remove(websocket)
